description: Perform a reliability analysis (Cronbach's alpha) on the five Agreeableness items (A1, A2, A3, A4, A5) using the 'BFI25.csv' dataset. Item A1 is negatively keyed and must be reverse-scaled (scale is 1-6). Include 'Cronbach's alpha if item dropped' in the analysis. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Agreeableness_Reliability.omv and create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/reliability_report.txt containing the overall Cronbach's alpha (3 decimal places), the highest possible alpha if one item is dropped (3 decimal places), and the name of the item to drop to achieve that higher alpha (
